## Testing

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest` passes locally
- [ ] New code paths have tests (or existing tests cover them)
- [ ] FreeCAD-dependent changes were verified against a live FreeCAD session
- [ ] Screenshots attached for geometry / UI changes (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes follow the style in `CLAUDE.md` (type hints, 4-space indent, frozen dataclasses where applicable)
- [ ] No secrets, absolute paths, or large binaries introduced
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if user-visible
